subcodes.first_line: O Kamal! The All-Possessing, the Most Exalted, maketh mention of thee from within the Most Great Prison. No bounty hath been greater than this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کمال غنی متعال در سجن اعظم تو را ذکر مینماید هیچ فضلی اعظم از این نبوده و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
